results.title: Holly Holm promises changes for Han title rematch
results.description: Saturday Boxing: Holly Holm vs. Stephanie Han, Amanda Serrano vs. Cheyenne Hanson, several other fights TV: ESPN, 7 p.m. (main card) Tickets: $67-$266, Ticketmaster.com So, what’s the antidote for slower hands? Faster feet, maybe? In Holly Holm’s loss to Stephanie Han by unanimous technical decision on Jan. 3 in Puerto Rico, the Albuquerque boxer was out-punched and out-landed by wide margins. ...

New Mexico United returns to Western Conference play in June. In the meantime, there’s just the matter of a bit of travel to New England. Specifically, Connecticut. Here are some things to ...

results.title: Lobo runner Habtom Samuel wins NCAA 5K semifinal
results.description: For the third straight year, Habtom Samuel will be on double duty at the NCAA Outdoor Track and Field Championships. New Mexico’s star junior finished the men’s 5,000-meter semifinal in 13 minutes and 38.12 seconds Friday at the NCAA West Regional Preliminaries, qualifying for his second race at the NCAA Outdoor Track and Field Championships in Eugene, Oregon. Racing at John McDonnell Field in ...

results.title: Raiders are already starting to experiment at OTAs just in case a worst-case scenario ends up happening
results.description: The Las Vegas Raiders are preparing for the possibility that one of their starters may not be ready for training camp. The Las Vegas Raiders are facing a challenge: one of their projected starters has missed all OTAs.

results.title: Pirates beat Twins after Bryan Reynolds hits walk-off home run
results.description: Bryan Reynolds hit a two-run homer with one out in the ninth inning to give the Pirates a 6-5 victory over the Twins on Friday night.

results.title: The Heat might have a leg up over all the teams interested in Giannis Antetokounmpo
results.description: The Giannis Antetokounmpo sweepstakes continue to intensify, and it seems the Miami Heat are in pole position.
